name: Whisper turbo on Short Clips (0.5-3 s)
short_description: Per-clip transcription predictions from Whisper large-v3-turbo (HuggingFace Transformers) on 44 synthetic short clips trimmed from gold-92 audio at 6 duration bins (0.5-3 s). Collected to assess short-clip robustness for production fit evaluation.
model_description: Whisper large-v3-turbo (openai/whisper-large-v3-turbo) via HuggingFace Transformers, float16 on CUDA. Domain vocabulary prompt injection (31 Rezolve terms). Note: faster-whisper is NOT used here due to a multi-GPU bug on the test host (confirmed in t0012); results may differ slightly from production brainpowa-realtime-api which uses faster-whisper.
prediction_schema: Each line is a JSON object with fields: clip_id (string), duration_s (float), transcript (string), is_empty (bool), is_hallucination (bool), no_speech_probability (float — proxy: 0.0 for non-empty, 1.0 for empty since HuggingFace Whisper does not expose per-segment no_speech_prob), latency_seconds (float), ttfd_seconds (float or null), num_chunks (int).

files.description: Per-clip transcription output for 44 synthetic short clips (0.5-3 s) from gold-92 audio
